net: # Net list for the OI 8HP TCU schematic. One row = one net node
# (component-pin pair). The same net name on multiple rows means those
# Pin numbers for U2/U3 (MAX22200) follow the canonical-channel order
# Section "Pin Configuration" before sending to a fab.

note: joined to VBAT at star point through bulk capacitor + ferrite (commented note; not a connection)
TJA1043 supply (note: TJA1043 has VIO + VBAT; the standard variant uses 5V on the digital side)
5V excitation to shaft speed sensors (TCM pin 15)
boot mode select — pulled to GND for boot from flash
via pulldown — direct connection on production board
STM32 GPIO controlling TJA1043 STBN (moved off PA8 — that's TIM1 CH1 for input shaft RPM)
STM32 GPIO controlling TJA1043 EN (moved off PA9 — TIM1 CH2 for output shaft RPM)
TJA1043 INH wake-up signal back to STM32 (EXTI-capable for wake from sleep)

net: # ===== LIN BUS (to aux pump on TCM pin 2; HZ hybrid only) =====

note: TCM pin 2 → aux 12V oil pump (LIN 2.x at 19200 baud)
STM32 GPIO controlling TJA1027 SLP_N (sleep when not in HZ variant)
STM32 SPI1 MOSI to first chip's input
STM32 SPI1 MISO from last chip's output
STM32 SPI1 NSS / chip-select (single CS for daisy chain)
chip 0 output → chip 1 input (the daisy link)
STM32 input (open-drain fault from either chip — wired-OR)

net: # chip 0 channel 7 left as a spare per SOLENOID_BINDING.md option A
# chip 1 channels 2-7 left spare for future variants / paralleled-channel mode

note: thermistor terminal B (note: NTC is differential; this design ties one side to GND through the harness)
STM32 GPIO (EXTI-capable; moved off PB10 — that's USART3 TX for debug)
SWD header GND wire (place on header pin layout when symbol is added)

net: # ===== Passthrough — external connector pins not used by this design =====
# The OEM external connector has 16 pins. We use 5 of them (T30+12V

component: PT-CAN1 H/L). The other 11 (incl. PT-CAN2 and 9 unlabeled) pass

net: # through unused on this design but the J1 connector body still presents
# them. Listed here as no-connect anchors so the netlist's J1 footprint

note: passthrough PT-CAN2 HIGH (unused — VCU on PT-CAN1)
